description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the sjdweb/go-docker-build:1.10 Docker image. Define a single test stage and a unit_tests job that runs in this stage. The job should execute the global before_script commands: cd $GOPATH/src, mkdir -p gitlab.com/$CI_PROJECT_NAMESPACE, cd gitlab.com/$CI_PROJECT_NAMESPACE, ln -s $CI_PROJECT_DIR, cd $CI_PROJECT_NAME, write a .netrc with machine gitlab.com login gitlab-ci-token password ${CI_JOB_TOKEN}, run dep init, and run dep ensure -vendor-only. After the before_script, the unit_tests job runs the command make test. No caches, artifacts, or conditional rules are defined.
